texto: Space station is, it really is one of the more, if not the most, impressive technological achievement of the modern day, not only in what we've accomplished engineering-wise but what we've accomplished on this international scale, because anybody will tell you that half the challenge is making it all work.
explicacao: Citação de Kevin A. Ford sobre temas ligados a sucesso. “Space station is, it really is one of the more, if not the most, impressive technological achieve…” articula sucesso, work, achievement em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e achievement.
